channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 【速報】札幌市長選へ荒井氏が離党届提出 「出馬準備進める」「人が育つ地域に」
item.author: 47NEWS (@47news.jp)
item.description: 【速報】札幌市長選へ荒井氏が離党届提出 「出馬準備進める」「人が育つ地域に」
item.content:encoded: 【速報】札幌市長選へ荒井氏が離党届提出 「出馬準備進める」「人が育つ地域に」

item.title: 朝の仕事終わって夕方の仕事まで錦糸町駅前ゲーセンで遊んでるんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾 2ヶ月ぶりに音ゲーなんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾

item.title: 【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖…
item.author: みすず書房 (@misuzushobo.bsky.social)
item.description:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...
item.content:encoded:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...

item.title: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emb…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!

item.title: ✏️ 次期Apple Pencil、まさかの大型刷新か EU規制対応でバッテリー交換に対応する可能性が浮上。「壊れたら…
item.author: 胡田@Microsoft MVP(2014~)&MCT / Masahiko Ebisuda (@ebibibibibibi.bsky.social)
item.description:
✏️ 次期Apple Pencil、まさかの大型刷新か

EU規制対応でバッテリー交換に対応する可能性が浮上。「壊れたら買い替え」だった常識が変わるかも？

投入は2027年前半と報じられています📱

詳しくはこちら👇
https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/07/13/apple-pencil2027-eu-refreshed-apple-pencils-may-arrive-next-year-with-improved-r/

#TechNews #Apple
item.content:encoded:
✏️ 次期Apple Pencil、まさかの大型刷新か

EU規制対応でバッテリー交換に対応する可能性が浮上。「壊れたら買い替え」だった常識が変わるかも？

投入は2027年前半と報じられています📱

詳しくはこちら👇
https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/07/13/apple-pencil2027-eu-refreshed-apple-pencils-may-arrive-next-year-with-improved-r/

#TechNews #Apple

item.title: I let my daughter, 9, stay up a little late to finish readin…
item.author: Joseph Rezek (@rezekjoe.bsky.social)
item.description: I let my daughter, 9, stay up a little late to finish reading her third Nancy Drew mystery, by the lamp at her bed. Is it 1955? 1985? What is happening? Not a phone in sight, literacy thriving; don’t let the world fall apart.
item.content:encoded: I let my daughter, 9, stay up a little late to finish reading her third Nancy Drew mystery, by the lamp at her bed. Is it 1955? 1985? What is happening? Not a phone in sight, literacy thriving; don’t let the world fall apart.

item.title: 🚀 Skyrocketing！ 🚀 (200+ new stars) 📦 wonderwhy-er / Desk…
item.author: GitHub Trending (@github-trending.bsky.social)
item.description:
🚀 Skyrocketing！ 🚀 (200+ new stars)

📦 wonderwhy-er / DesktopCommanderMCP
⭐ 7,887 (+207)

This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Skyrocketing！ 🚀 (200+ new stars)

📦 wonderwhy-er / DesktopCommanderMCP
⭐ 7,887 (+207)
🗒 TypeScript

This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

item.title: #ぼっち・ざ・ろっく 喜多郁代(ダーウィンが喜多ver.) 最近ぼざろの絵が多くなってますね。。 来週は出来れば違う二次…

来週は出来れば違う二次創作にします
そして色塗りペン入れ間に合わなかったw

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the P…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: "ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033 Cutemen「RELAX」 youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?.…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます
item.content:encoded:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます

item.title: #🔖世の中 「黙認されてきたのに、なぜ今」全国でソープランド摘発相次ぐ…“裏事情”と見落とされがちな“最大の被害者”と…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「黙認されてきたのに、なぜ今」全国でソープランド摘発相次ぐ…“裏事情”と見落とされがちな“最大の被害者”とは【弁護士解説】（弁護士JPニュース） - Yahoo!ニュース

各地でソープランドの摘発が相次いでいる。43年続く老舗もその例外ではなかった。 ネット上でも「これまで事実上黙認されてきたのに、なぜ今になって」と疑問や困惑の声が広がる。 【画像】相次ぐ摘発の裏事情を推察する若林弁護士 和歌山市のソープランド「SK」で売春行為を知りながら個室を提供したとして会社役員の男...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「黙認されてきたのに、なぜ今」全国でソープランド摘発相次ぐ…“裏事情”と見落とされがちな“最大の被害者”とは【弁護士解説】（弁護士JPニュース） - Yahoo!ニュース

各地でソープランドの摘発が相次いでいる。43年続く老舗もその例外ではなかった。 ネット上でも「これまで事実上黙認されてきたのに、なぜ今になって」と疑問や困惑の声が広がる。 【画像】相次ぐ摘発の裏事情を推察する若林弁護士 和歌山市のソープランド「SK」で売春行為を知りながら個室を提供したとして会社役員の男...

item.title: @hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democra…
item.author: 💙🏳️‍🌈 Goldie (aka Kh’ymm) 🏳️‍🌈💙 (@thegoldfishmind.bsky.social)
item.description:
@hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democracy into a nightly act of devotion, writing alone past midnight, no sponsors, no noise, just truth and care.

She’s given millions a place to breathe, to understand, to feel less alone. Grateful for her light in the dark.

TYSM HCR!

#Pinks
item.content:encoded:
@hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democracy into a nightly act of devotion, writing alone past midnight, no sponsors, no noise, just truth and care.

She’s given millions a place to breathe, to understand, to feel less alone. Grateful for her light in the dark.

TYSM HCR!

#Pinks

item.title: Texas AG Ken Paxton vowed to “stop at nothing to uncover and…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Texas AG Ken Paxton vowed to “stop at nothing to uncover and stop any illegal voting activity.”

But experts say he may have violated state law by using an address where he no longer appears to live to vote in six elections in two years.

w/ @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
Texas AG Ken Paxton vowed to “stop at nothing to uncover and stop any illegal voting activity.”

But experts say he may have violated state law by using an address where he no longer appears to live to vote in six elections in two years.

w/ @texastribune.org

item.title: Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are …
item.author: Max B 💙 🔶 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 (@maxbrockbank.com)
item.description:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.
item.content:encoded:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.

item.description: The Norwegian team has been a delight to watch and they represent all that is positive about football.
item.content:encoded: The Norwegian team has been a delight to watch and they represent all that is positive about football.

item.title: Canadian Mi’kmaw used canoe for transportation and learned t…
item.author: Spudislander45 🇨🇦❤️🌎💪🫡 (@spudislander45.bsky.social)
item.description:
Canadian Mi’kmaw used canoe for transportation and learned that using spruce roots and eel grass tied to their canoe who deter sharks.

#Canada #AtlanticCanadian #AtlanticOcean #Sharks
item.content:encoded:
Canadian Mi’kmaw used canoe for transportation and learned that using spruce roots and eel grass tied to their canoe who deter sharks.

#Canada #AtlanticCanadian #AtlanticOcean #Sharks

item.title: While I was asleep, Lindsey Graham died and Conor McGregor w…
item.author: punkrockbeth (@punkrockbeth.bsky.social)
item.description: While I was asleep, Lindsey Graham died and Conor McGregor was injured and defeated. I am buying a lotto ticket today.
item.content:encoded: While I was asleep, Lindsey Graham died and Conor McGregor was injured and defeated. I am buying a lotto ticket today.

item.description: A galera se faz um pouco de burra pra não entender o motivo da galera tá com ranço da Argentina nessa Copa, né?

item.title: Buddy had a friend of his wife’s go to Book of Mormon today.…
item.author: Nick Case (@nick422.bsky.social)
item.description: Buddy had a friend of his wife’s go to Book of Mormon today. There’s a sequence where the lead character dreams he’s in hell. The lead actor threw in a “Hi Lindsay Graham!” during the matinee.
item.content:encoded: Buddy had a friend of his wife’s go to Book of Mormon today. There’s a sequence where the lead character dreams he’s in hell. The lead actor threw in a “Hi Lindsay Graham!” during the matinee.
